details.reasoning: Excellent implementation meeting all rubric requirements. The Zig file (INIObject.zig) correctly implements create, parse, and stringify functions with proper JSValue handling. Parse function comprehensively handles INI sections (nested objects), key=value pairs, comments (both ; and #), CRLF line endings, quote stripping, boolean/null coercion, and duplicate section merging. Wiring is complete: proper lazy property callback in BunObject.zig with getINIObject function, C++ exports macro entry, and hash table entry in BunObject.cpp. TypeScript definitions are well-documented with examples in both bun.d.ts and private.d.ts. Parser is self-contained with no npm dependency imports. Code follows Zig conventions (JSFunction.create, ZigString.static, @import("bun"), proper error handling). Comprehensive test suite with 40+ tests covering edge cases, round-trip conversions, and error conditions. Minor deduction (0.05) only because code execution cannot be verified in this review, though the implementation appears correct and complete.
